title: ExpView
description: A mod that displays the current amount of XP on the screen.
body:
**This mod displays your experience points directly on the screen.** ## Mod Commands - `/exp menu` - show menu - `/exp off` - hides the XP counter on the screen - `/exp on` - shows the XP counter on the screen - `/exp reset` - resets the XP counter position to `default` ## Menu Functionality - Ability to drag the XP counter with your mouse.
- Ability to recalculate experience points into levels and vice versa.
- The `"XP" button` allows you to `enable/disable` text fields for converting experience. - Ability to change the color of the XP counter using a palette. - The `palette button` allows you to `enable/disable` the display of the palette. ## GitHub
